meta.title: Dr. Hilda Momeni | Hair, Skin & Beauty
meta.description: Aesthetic dermatology clinic of Dr. Hilda Momeni — calm, evidence-based, personalised care for hair, skin and beauty.

hero.name: Dr. Hilda Momeni
hero.valueProp: Calm, evidence-based and personalised care for the health and beauty of your skin and hair.

about.heading: The science of skin, with a human touch
about.body: With years of experience across hair, skin and aesthetic care, Dr. Hilda Momeni follows an approach that is evidence-based yet deeply attentive. Every treatment plan is built around the real needs and circumstances of each person.
about.philosophy: “Lasting beauty begins with health — not with haste, but with careful, considered care.”

services.heading: Three pillars of care
services.intro: From scalp health to skin clarity and balanced aesthetics — care that is integrated and considered.

items.title: Hair
items.desc: Assessment of hair and scalp health with specialised care to strengthen and maintain.

items.title: Skin
items.desc: Evaluation, cleansing and evidence-based skin care tailored to each person.

items.title: Beauty
items.desc: Aesthetic treatments with a natural, balanced approach that suits your features.

treatments.heading: Selected procedures
treatments.intro: A selection of the clinic's most requested treatments, performed with care and current standards.

items.name: Skin mesotherapy
items.desc: Delivering nourishing compounds into the skin for freshness and vitality.

items.name: Hair loss care
items.desc: Investigating causes of shedding and shaping a care plan suited to you.

items.name: Skin rejuvenation
items.desc: Approaches that support renewal and an even, natural-looking complexion.

beforeAfter.heading: Before & after
beforeAfter.intro: Examples from real care journeys will appear here soon.
beforeAfter.note: * Images are illustrative only; individual results vary.

steps.title: Initial consultation
steps.desc: A conversation about your goals, history and expectations.

steps.title: Assessment & diagnosis
steps.desc: A careful review of your skin or hair to understand the real need.

steps.title: Personalised plan
steps.desc: A clear, step-by-step plan shaped specifically around you.

steps.title: Follow-up & care
steps.desc: Ongoing guidance and review of results over time.

items.name: Patient

items.q: What happens in the first session?
items.a: The first session is dedicated to conversation, assessment and answering your questions, after which a proposed treatment plan is presented.

items.q: How do I book an appointment?
items.a: Use the “Book consultation” button on this page or contact the clinic to arrange a time that suits you.
Depending on the service, an initial online consultation may be possible. Details are confirmed when you book.
Fees are determined after the consultation, based on each person's situation and the chosen treatment plan.
Time to results depends on the treatment and individual factors, and is explained during your consultation.

cta.heading: Ready for the first step?
cta.body: Get in touch to book a consultation and receive a treatment plan tailored to you.

footer.tagline: Hair, skin & aesthetic dermatology — calm, scientific, personal care.
footer.disclaimer: Information on this website is for educational purposes only and is not a substitute for medical advice, diagnosis or treatment. Always consult a physician for any treatment decision.
